jsonLd.title: Nykaa is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nykaa. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About Nykaa:
Nykaa is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa!
